name: Hackathon Dev Environment
postCreateCommand: for d in ~/.vscode-remote/data/Machine ~/.vscode-server/data/Machine; do mkdir -p "$d" && for f in /usr/local/share/hackathon-template/*; do [ -e "$f" ] || continue; [ -f "$d/$(basename "$f")" ] || cp "$f" "$d/"; done; done
postStartCommand: for d in ~/.vscode-remote/data/Machine ~/.vscode-server/data/Machine; do mkdir -p "$d" && for f in /usr/local/share/hackathon-template/*; do [ -e "$f" ] || continue; [ -f "$d/$(basename "$f")" ] || cp "$f" "$d/"; done; done
